headline: Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) Delivers Strong Q1 CY2026 Numbers
summary: Energy technology company Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2.5% year on year to $6.59 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.58 per share was 17.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: The Bull Case For Baker Hughes (BKR) Could Change Following Sharp EPS Estimate Cuts Before Earnings
summary: Baker Hughes recently presented at the USHCC Energy Summit in Santa Fe and is set to report quarterly earnings after market close, with analysts expecting revenue of about US$7.39 billion, roughly flat year on year. headline: Baker Hughes Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: HOUSTON and LONDON, April 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) announced today that the Baker Hughes Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share of Class A common stock payable on May 15, 2026, to holders of record on May 5, 2026.
